response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates exceptional software engineering practices, architectural thinking, and mentoring capabilities across 20 years of development experience, the role specifically requires 8-12 years of C++ expertise combined with industrial automation knowledge. The resume shows only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (2014-2015 at National Instruments) and no background in industrial IoT, real-time systems, message brokers, MQTT, or IEC 62443 security standards. The candidate's strength is full-stack web/backend development with modern cloud platforms (AWS, TypeScript, Node.js), which doesn't align with the core C++ and industrial automation requirements.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals: Deep expertise in TDD, CI/CD, architecture, and design patterns demonstrated across 20 years
Proven mentoring and technical communication: Creates workshops, organizes code dojos, published talks at major conferences (FOSS4G)
Cloud platform and modern development stack: Recent experience with AWS CDK, TypeScript, Node.js, and full-stack development
concerns: Insufficient C++ expertise: Only ~6 months of professional experience from 2014-2015; recent work heavily focused on TypeScript/JavaScript/Node.js
No industrial automation or IoT background: Experience is primarily in web/GIS/financial platforms; no exposure to embedded systems, real-time systems, or industrial protocols
Missing critical security and standards knowledge: No mention of IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity expertise

key_factors.factor: C++ experience gap (0.5 years vs. 8-12 required)
Strong software engineering and mentoring fundamentals
